creator: dwcjr@inethouston.net
text:
Proftpd requires /var/run/proftpd to exist for ftpcount and ftpwho but when I reboot that directory get deleted and ftpcount and ftpwho complains that it doesn't exist, running proftpd-pre10(latest in the ports dir)

How-To-Repeat: reboot machine then /var/run/proftpd ceases to exist
